Shared Boat Trips in Benalmádena & Estepona

Share the experience of sailing the Mediterranean and discover the Costa del Sol in the best company.

  1. Home
  2. Shared Group Trips

Your Spot in Paradise: Shared Tours

Sailing Day Trip Costa del Sol 5.0 (Top Rated)

Enjoy the exclusivity of a professional boat without renting the entire vessel. Feel the Mediterranean!

View Trip Details

Shared Boat Tours & Experiences

Want to enjoy the sea without booking a private charter? Our shared group trips are the perfect option to relax, sunbathe, and enjoy the best views of the Costa del Sol while sharing the experience with other sea lovers.

We will sail in search of the Mediterranean breeze, with the chance to spot dolphins in their natural habitat or enjoy a refreshing swim in the open sea. It is a journey designed to disconnect and experience the luxury of sailing at an affordable price from Malaga, Marbella, and Estepona.

"A personal and professional experience: we keep groups small to ensure every passenger enjoys maximum comfort on board our shared charters."

Key Highlights

  • Affordable Price (Value for money)
  • Professional Captain in charge
  • Small group (Max. 12 people)
  • Complimentary drink included
  • Dolphin spotting opportunities
  • Swimming stop in crystal waters

Roadmap: Your Shared Journey

01

Welcome and Boarding

Meeting point at the port. After a brief safety talk and welcome from our skipper, we cast off to begin our collective adventure.

02

Sailing the Costa del Sol

We head out to the open sea to enjoy breathtaking views. Feel the breeze as we navigate the bay, always on the lookout for dolphins.

Galería de la Experiencia

Common Questions

Our shared trips usually have fixed schedules. Morning sessions typically start at 10:00 AM every two hours untill 8 PM depending on the season.

Yes! While this rate is for individual spots, you can always choose to book the entire boat exclusively for your group if you prefer more privacy.

The price includes your spot on the vessel, a professional Captain, fuel, and a refreshing drink (water, soft drink, or beer).

Absolutely! Most of our shared experiences include a stop for a refreshing dip in the Mediterranean, as long as sea conditions allow it.

We often spot dolphins during our trips! While they are wild animals and sightings aren't 100% guaranteed, our Captains always look for them to make your experience special.

Rates & Shared Trips

Shared Group Experience

Enjoy a premium sailing experience at an affordable price. Meet new people and share the beauty of the Costa del Sol.

60€ / person

Duration: 2 to 4 hours (depending on the schedule).
What's Included: Professional Captain, fuel, and a refreshing drink.

Book My Spots
